Key Map for Battlefield Operations

Ckpit
ALOW altitude dec Alt-, DecreaseAlow
ALOW altitude inc Alt-. IncreaseAlow
AP Override Ctrl-3 SimAPOverride
AP Switch Left Ctrl-1 SimLeftAPSwitch
AP Switch Right Ctrl-2 SimRightAPSwitch
AVTR F SimAVTRToggle
AVTR Switch Alt-F SimAVTRSwitch
AVTR Switch back Unassigned SimAVTRSwitchBack
Air Source Dec Shift-Ctrl-F3 SimDecAirSource
Air Source Inc Shift-Ctrl-F4 SimIncAirSource
Air brakes close Ctrl-B AFBrakesIn
Air brakes open Shift-B AFBrakesOut
Air brakes toggle B AFBrakesToggle
Aircraft lights Shift-Alt-L SimToggleExtLights
Alternate Landing Gear Shift-Ctrl-Alt-G AFAlternateGear
Autopilot A SimToggleAutopilot
Aux Comm AA/TR Alt-F6 SimToggleAuxComAATR
Aux Comm Band X/Y Alt-F4 SimCycleBandAuxComDigit
Aux Comm Ctr digit Alt-F2 SimCycleCenterAuxComDigit
Aux Comm Lft digit Alt-F1 SimCycleLeftAuxComDigit
Aux Comm Rt digit Alt-F3 SimCycleRightAuxComDigit
Aux Comm UFC/Backup Alt-F5 SimToggleAuxComMaster
Betty Master Caution Ctrl-C ExtinguishMasterCaution
Betty gear horn Ctrl-G SimSilenceHorn
CAT I/III Shift-C SimCATSwitch
Chaff/Flare auto/manual Alt-Z SimToggleDropPattern
Deploy Drag Chute Shift-D AFDragChute
Dogfight override mode D SimSelectSRMOverride
Drop chaff X SimDropChaff
Drop flare Z SimDropFlare
Dump Fuel Alt-D SimFuelDump
ECM J SimECMOn
EPU step Alt-E SimEpuToggle
Eject Ctrl-E SimEject
F ACK Ctrl-F SimICPFAck
FCC submodes ' SimFCCSubModeStep
Fuel Door Shift-Ctrl-R SimFuelDoorToggle
Fuel Ext. Transfer Unassigned SimWingFirst
Fuel Master Switch Shift-Ctrl-F7 SimToggleMasterFuel
Fuel Pump Switch Dec Shift-Ctrl-F5 SimDecFuelPump
Fuel Pump Switch Inc Shift-Ctrl-F6 SimIncFuelPump
Fuel Switch Dec Shift-Ctrl-F1 SimDecFuelSwitch
Fuel Switch Inc Shift-Ctrl-F2 SimIncFuelSwitch
Ground Jett enable Alt-J SimGndJettEnable
Hook Ctrl-K SimHookToggle
IFF Master Unassigned SimIFFPower
INS Dec Ctrl-Alt-F7 SimINSDec
INS Inc Ctrl-Alt-F8 SimINSInc
Instrument lights Shift-Ctrl-L SimInstrumentLight
JFS switch Shift-J SimJfsStart
Jettison all Ctrl-J SimEmergencyJettison
Kneeboard page Alt-K KneeboardTogglePage
Landing gear G AFGearToggle
Landing gear Down Alt-G AFGearDown
Landing gear Up Shift-G AFGearUp
Landing light Ctrl-Alt-L SimLandingLightToggle
Laser Arm Alt-L SimLaserArmToggle
MRM override mode M SimSelectMRMOverride
MRM/DF override cancel C SimDeselectOverride
Manual pitch override O SimMPOToggle
Master Arm cycle Shift-Ctrl-Alt-M SimStepMasterArm
Master Arm on Shift-M SimArmMasterArm
Master Arm safe Ctrl-M SimSafeMasterArm
Master Arm sim Alt-M SimSimMasterArm
NVG N ToggleNVGMode
Open/Close canopy Shift-Ctrl-C AFCanopyToggle
Parking brake Alt-P SimParkingBrakeToggle
Power Datalink Shift-Alt-F11 SimDLPower
Power FCC Shift-Alt-F6 SimFCCPower
Power FCR Shift-Alt-F5 SimFCRPower
Power GPS Shift-Alt-F10 SimGPSPower
Power HUD Shift-Alt-F2 SimHUDPower
Power Left Hpt Shift-Alt-F3 SimLeftHptPower
Power MAP Shift-Alt-F12 SimMAPPower
Power MFD Shift-Alt-F8 SimMFDPower
Power Main Dec Ctrl-Alt-F1 SimMainPowerDec
Power Main Inc Ctrl-Alt-F2 SimMainPowerInc
Power Right Hpt Shift-Alt-F4 SimRightHptPower
Power SMS Shift-Alt-F7 SimSMSPower
Power TISL Shift-Alt-F1 SimTISLPower
Power UFC Shift-Alt-F9 SimUFCPower
Radar Altimeter OFF Alt-A SimRALTOFF
Radar Altimeter ON Shift-A SimRALTON
Radar Altimeter STDBY Ctrl-A SimRALTSTDBY
Reset Alt Gear Extension Shift-Ctrl-G AFAlternateGearReset
SeatArm Shift-Ctrl-E SimSeatArm
Steerpoint next S SimNextWaypoint
Steerpoint previous Shift-S SimPrevWaypoint
Terrain Following Radar Shift-Ctrl-A SimToggleTFR
UHF Normal/Backup Alt-F7 SimToggleUHFMaster
VMS Inhibit Ctrl-V SimInhibitVMS
Wheel brakes K SimWheelBrakes
Comm
1 Volume Down Ctrl-Alt-[ SimStepComm1VolumeDown
1 Volume up Ctrl-Alt-] SimStepComm1VolumeUp
2 Volume Down Shift-Ctrl-Alt-[ SimStepComm2VolumeDown
2 Volume up Shift-Ctrl-Alt-] SimStepComm2VolumeUp
Ctrls
Full afterburner Ctrl-= AFABFull
Min Afterburner Ctrl-- AFABOn
Nose down Shift-Ctrl-Uparrow AFElevatorDown
Nose up Shift-Ctrl-Downarrow AFElevatorUp
Roll left Shift-Ctrl-Leftarrow AFAileronLeft
Roll right Shift-Ctrl-Rtarrow AFAileronRight
Rudder left , AFRudderLeft
Rudder right . AFRudderRight
Step throttle down Shift-- AFCoarseThrottleDown
Step throttle up Shift-= AFCoarseThrottleUp
Throttle Idle Alt-- AFIdle
Throttle Idle Detent Alt-I SimThrottleIdleDetent
Throttle back - AFThrottleDown
Throttle forward = AFThrottleUp
EWS
Chaff Power Ctrl-Alt-F3 SimEWSChaffPower
Flare Power Ctrl-Alt-F4 SimEWSFlarePower
Jammer Power Ctrl-Alt-F5 SimEWSJammerPower
PGM Dec Shift-Z SimEWSPGMDec
PGM Inc Shift-X SimEWSPGMInc
Program Dec Shift-Q SimEWSProgDec
Program Inc Shift-W SimEWSProgInc
RWR Power Ctrl-Alt-F6 SimEWSRWRPower
Easy Radar
Boresight Enemy Shift-R SimRadarBoresightEnemy
Boresight Friendly Shift-Y SimRadarBoresightFriendly
Closest Enemy E SimRadarClosestEnemy
Closest Friendly T SimRadarClosestFriendly
Next Enemy R SimRadarNextEnemy
Next Friendly Y SimRadarNextFriendly
Previous Enemy Shift-E SimRadarPreviousEnemy
Previous Friendly Shift-T SimRadarPreviousFriendly
FAC
Check In Unassigned FACCheckIn
Check Out Unassigned FACCheckOut
In Unassigned FACIn
Out Unassigned FACOut
Ready Unassigned FACReady
Request BDA Unassigned FACRequestBDA
Request Location Unassigned FACRequestLocation
Request Mark Unassigned FACRequestMark
Request TACAN Unassigned FACRequestTACAN
Request Target Unassigned FACRequestTarget
Unable Unassigned FACUnable
Wilco Unassigned FACWilco
Flaps
Decrease Ctrl-F11 AFDecFlap
Decrease LEF Alt-F11 AFDecLEF
Increase Ctrl-F12 AFIncFlap
Increase LEF Alt-F12 AFIncLEF
LE Normal/Extend Unassigned SimAltFlaps
Lock LEFs Ctrl-5 SimLEFLockSwitch
Set LEF to Full Alt-F10 AFFullLEF
Set LEF to Null Alt-F9 AFNoLEF
Set to Full Ctrl-F10 AFFullFlap
Set to Null Ctrl-F9 AFNoFlap
HOTAS
Cursor enable Shift-N SimCursorEnable
DMS Down Shift-Num 2 SimDMSDown
DMS Left Shift-Num 4 SimDMSLeft
DMS Right Shift-Num 6 OTWStepMFD2
DMS Up Shift-Num 8 SimDMSUp
First Trigger Detent Ctrl-/ SimTriggerFirstDetent
Pinky Switch Alt-V SimPinkySwitch
Second Trigger Detent Alt-/ SimTriggerSecondDetent
TMS Down Ctrl-Downarrow SimTMSDown
TMS Left Ctrl-Leftarrow SimTMSLeft
TMS Right Ctrl-Rtarrow SimTMSRight
TMS Up Ctrl-Uparrow SimTMSUp
HSI
Course decrement Ctrl-Alt-V SimHsiCourseDec
Course increment Ctrl-Alt-B SimHsiCourseInc
Heading decrement Ctrl-Alt-N SimHsiHeadingDec
Heading increment Ctrl-Alt-M SimHsiHeadingInc
Modes toggle I SimStepHSIMode
HUD
Altimeter type Shift-Ctrl-Alt-A SimHUDRadar
Brightness Shift-Ctrl-Alt-B SimHUDBrightness
Brightness Down Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Z SimHUDBrightnessDown
Brightness Up Shift-Ctrl-Alt-X SimHUDBrightnessUp
Color Shift-Ctrl-Alt-C OTWStepHudColor
Declutter H OTWToggleScales
Display DED Shift-Ctrl-Alt-D SimHUDDED
Display FLIR Shift-H SimFLIRToggle
Flight Path Marker Shift-Ctrl-Alt-F OTWTogglePitchLadder
Heading scales Shift-Ctrl-Alt-S OTWStepHeadingScale
Man.Bomb Reticle Down Ctrl-[ SimRetDn
Man.Bomb Reticle Up Ctrl-] SimRetUp
Pitch ladder Shift-Ctrl-Alt-P OTWTogglePitchLadder
Scale type Shift-Ctrl-Alt-H OTWToggleScales
Velocity cues Shift-Ctrl-Alt-V SimHUDVelocity
Warning reset Shift-Ctrl-Alt-W SimWarnReset
ICP
0 M-SEL Ctrl-Num 0 SimICPZERO
1 ILS Ctrl-Num 7 SimICPTILS
2 ALOW Ctrl-Num 8 SimICPALOW
3 Ctrl-Num 9 SimICPTHREE
4 STPT Ctrl-Num 4 SimICPStpt
5 CRUS Ctrl-Num 5 SimICPCrus
6 TIME Ctrl-Num 6 SimICPSIX
7 MARK Ctrl-Num 1 SimICPMark
8 FIX Ctrl-Num 2 SimICPEIGHT
9 A-CAL Ctrl-Num 3 SimICPNINE
AA Shift-Num 0 SimICPAA
AG Shift-Num period SimICPAG
COM1 Shift-Num divide SimICPCom1
COM2 Shift-Num times SimICPCom2
DCS Down Ctrl-End SimICPDEDDOWN
DCS Return Ctrl-Insert SimICPResetDED
DCS Seq Ctrl-Pageup SimICPDEDSEQ
DCS Up Ctrl-Home SimICPDEDUP
DLNK Ctrl-D SimICPLink
Drift C/O Ctrl-Pagedown SimDriftCO
Enter Ctrl-Num enter SimICPEnter
IFF Shift-Num 7 SimICPIFF
LIST Shift-Num 9 SimICPLIST
NAV Shift-Num enter SimICPNav
Next Ctrl-Num plus SimICPNext
Previous Ctrl-Num minus SimICPPrevious
Reset Ctrl-Delete SimICPCLEAR
Sym Wheel Down Unassigned SimSymWheelDn
Sym Wheel Up Unassigned SimSymWheelUp
Key
Combination Alt-C Alt-C CommandsSetKeyCombo
Combination Ctrl-X Ctrl-X CommandsSetKeyCombo
Combination Ctrl-Z Ctrl-Z CommandsSetKeyCombo
Landing Help Toggle Alt-H ToggleLandingHelpMode
LeftMFD
Brightness Down Ctrl-Alt-F SimCBEOSB_GAINDOWN_L
Brightness Up Ctrl-Alt-G SimCBEOSB_GAINUP_L
OSB 01 Ctrl-Alt-1 SimCBEOSB_1L
OSB 02 Ctrl-Alt-2 SimCBEOSB_2L
OSB 03 Ctrl-Alt-3 SimCBEOSB_3L
OSB 04 Ctrl-Alt-4 SimCBEOSB_4L
OSB 05 Ctrl-Alt-5 SimCBEOSB_5L
OSB 06 Ctrl-Alt-6 SimCBEOSB_6L
OSB 07 Ctrl-Alt-7 SimCBEOSB_7L
OSB 08 Ctrl-Alt-8 SimCBEOSB_8L
OSB 09 Ctrl-Alt-9 SimCBEOSB_9L
OSB 10 Ctrl-Alt-0 SimCBEOSB_10L
OSB 11 Ctrl-Alt-Num 1 SimCBEOSB_11L
OSB 12 Ctrl-Alt-Num 2 SimCBEOSB_12L
OSB 13 Ctrl-Alt-Num 3 SimCBEOSB_13L
OSB 14 Ctrl-Alt-Num 4 SimCBEOSB_14L
OSB 15 Ctrl-Alt-Num 5 SimCBEOSB_15L
OSB 16 Ctrl-Alt-Num 6 SimCBEOSB_16L
OSB 17 Ctrl-Alt-Num 7 SimCBEOSB_17L
OSB 18 Ctrl-Alt-Num 8 SimCBEOSB_18L
OSB 19 Ctrl-Alt-Num 9 SimCBEOSB_19L
OSB 20 Ctrl-Alt-Num 0 SimCBEOSB_20L
Lights
Extl Anti Coll Ctrl-Alt-F10 SimExtlAntiColl
Extl Power Ctrl-Alt-F9 SimExtlPower
Extl Steady Ctrl-Alt-F12 SimExtlSteady
Extl Wing Ctrl-Alt-F11 SimExtlWing
Interior Lights Unassigned SimInteriorLight
Test Ctrl-T SimMalIndLights
MFD
Step 1 [ OTWStepMFD1
Step 2 ] OTWStepMFD2
Step 3 Shift-] OTWStepMFD3
Step 4 Shift-[ OTWStepMFD4
RWR
Handoff Shift-Pagedown SimRWRHandoff
Low Home SimRWRSetGroundPriority
Naval Shift-Pageup SimRWRSetNaval
Power Unassigned SimRwrPower
Priority Insert SimRWRSetPriority
Search Shift-Insert SimRWRSetSearch
Target Separate Pageup SimRWRSetTargetSep
Unknown Shift-Home SimRWRSetUnknowns
Radar
ACM 30x20 Ctrl-F6 SimACM30x20
ACM boresight Ctrl-F5 SimACMBoresight
ACM slewable Ctrl-F7 SimACMSlew
ACM vertical Ctrl-F8 SimACMVertical
Air to Air F1 SimRadarAAModeStep
Air to Ground F2 SimRadarAGModeStep
Antenna center F6 SimRadarElevationCenter
Antenna tilt down F5 SimRadarElevationDown
Antenna tilt up F7 SimRadarElevationUp
Bar scan Shift-F8 SimRadarBarScanChange
Cursor down Downarrow SimCursorDown
Cursor left Leftarrow SimCursorLeft
Cursor right Rtarrow SimCursorRight
Cursor up Uparrow SimCursorUp
Designate target Num 0 SimDesignate
GM FOV Shift-F9 SimRadarFOVStep
GM picture freeze F10 SimRadarFreeze
GM snowplow Shift-F10 SimRadarSnowplow
HSD range decrease Shift-F11 SimHSDRangeStepDown
HSD range increase Shift-F12 SimHSDRangeStepUp
Maverick FOV Shift-V SimMaverickFOVStep
RF Inhibit Shift-Alt-R SimRFSwitch
Range Knob Down Ctrl-F3 SimRangeKnobDown
Range Knob Up Ctrl-F4 SimRangeKnobUp
SOI FOV V SimSOIFOVStep
cursors reset Shift-Downarrow SimRadarCursorZero
gain decrease Shift-F3 SimRadarGainDown
gain increase Shift-F4 SimRadarGainUp
lock next target Pagedown SimRadarNextTarget
lock previous target Delete SimRadarPrevTarget
range decrease F3 SimRadarRangeStepDown
range increase F4 SimRadarRangeStepUp
return to search Num period SimDropTrack
standby Ctrl-R SimRadarStandby
submodes/azimuth F11 SimRadarAzimuthScanChange
Radio
ATC message T RadioTowerCommand
AWACS command Q RadioAWACSCommand
Channel cycle Alt-Y SimCycleRadioChannel
Element command E RadioElementCommand
Flight command R RadioFlightCommand
Menu Tab RadioMenuCommand
Tanker message Y RadioTankerCommand
Wingman command W RadioWingCommand
RightMFD
Brightness Down Shift-Alt-F SimCBEOSB_GAINDOWN_R
Brightness Up Shift-Alt-G SimCBEOSB_GAINUP_R
OSB 01 Shift-Alt-1 SimCBEOSB_1R
OSB 02 Shift-Alt-2 SimCBEOSB_2R
OSB 03 Shift-Alt-3 SimCBEOSB_3R
OSB 04 Shift-Alt-4 SimCBEOSB_4R
OSB 05 Shift-Alt-5 SimCBEOSB_5R
OSB 06 Shift-Alt-6 SimCBEOSB_6R
OSB 07 Shift-Alt-7 SimCBEOSB_7R
OSB 08 Shift-Alt-8 SimCBEOSB_8R
OSB 09 Shift-Alt-9 SimCBEOSB_9R
OSB 10 Shift-Alt-0 SimCBEOSB_10R
OSB 11 Shift-Alt-Num 1 SimCBEOSB_11R
OSB 12 Shift-Alt-Num 2 SimCBEOSB_12R
OSB 13 Shift-Alt-Num 3 SimCBEOSB_13R
OSB 14 Shift-Alt-Num 4 SimCBEOSB_14R
OSB 15 Shift-Alt-Num 5 SimCBEOSB_15R
OSB 16 Shift-Alt-Num 6 SimCBEOSB_16R
OSB 17 Shift-Alt-Num 7 SimCBEOSB_17R
OSB 18 Shift-Alt-Num 8 SimCBEOSB_18R
OSB 19 Shift-Alt-Num 9 SimCBEOSB_19R
OSB 20 Shift-Alt-Num 0 SimCBEOSB_20R
Sim
2x time compression Capslock TimeAccelerate
4X time acceleration Unassigned TimeAccelerateMaxToggle
Calibrate Joystick Alt-C , J CalibrateJoystick
Chat Grave SimOpenChatBox
Exit Escape SimEndFlight
Freeze Shift-P SimMotionFreeze
Mouse Button 1 Alt-Q SimMouseButton1
Mouse Button 2 Alt-W SimMouseButton2
Mouse SOI Hold Unassigned SimMouseSOI
Mouse SOI Off Alt-] SimMouseSOIOff
Mouse SOI On Alt-[ SimMouseSOIOn
Mouse SOI Toggle Unassigned SimMouseSOIToggle
Pause P SimTogglePaused
Screen shot Sysreq ScreenShot
Set AB Detent Alt-C , K SetABDetent
Show score Alt-R OTWToggleScoreDisplay
Smoke toggle Ctrl-S ToggleSmoke
Sound down Alt-B SoundDown
Sound off Alt-S SoundOff
Sound up Alt-N SoundUp
Time Accel Dec Ctrl-Capslock TimeAccelerateDec
Time Accel Inc Shift-Capslock TimeAccelerateInc
cockpit setup load Alt-C , L LoadCockpitDefaults
cockpit setup save Alt-C , S SaveCockpitDefaults
labels far Ctrl-L OTWToggleCampNames
labels near Shift-L OTWToggleNames
Sound
Missile Volume Down Shift-Ctrl-[ SimStepMissileVolumeDown
Missile Volume up Shift-Ctrl-] SimStepMissileVolumeUp
Threat Volume Down Shift-Alt-[ SimStepThreatVolumeDown
Threat Volume up Shift-Alt-] SimStepThreatVolumeUp
Trim
AP Disc Ctrl-4 SimTrimAPDisc
Aileron Left Shift-Leftarrow AFAileronTrimLeft
Aileron Right Shift-Rtarrow AFAileronTrimRight
Elevator Down Alt-Downarrow AFElevatorTrimDown
Elevator Up Alt-Uparrow AFElevatorTrimUp
Manual nose down Shift-Alt-End SimTrimNoseDown
Manual nose up Shift-Alt-Home SimTrimNoseUp
Manual roll left Shift-Alt-Delete SimTrimRollLeft
Manual roll right Shift-Alt-Pagedown SimTrimRollRight
Manual yaw Left Shift-Alt-Insert SimTrimYawLeft
Manual yaw right Shift-Alt-Pageup SimTrimYawRight
Reset Shift-Uparrow AFResetTrim
Rudder Left Alt-Leftarrow AFRudderTrimLeft
Rudder Right Alt-Rtarrow AFRudderTrimRight
View
2D Cockpit 2 OTWSelect2DCockpitMode
Action Camera Shift-Grave OTWToggleActionCamera
Aircraft next Shift-. OTWStepNextAC
Aircraft previous Shift-, OTWStepPrevAC
Chase 9 OTWSelectChaseMode
Cockpit 10:00 Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num 7 OTW1000View
Cockpit 2:00 Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num 9 OTW200View
Cockpit 3:00 Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num 6 OTW300View
Cockpit 4:00 Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num 3 OTW400View
Cockpit 8:00 Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num 1 OTW800View
Cockpit 9:00 Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num 4 OTW900View
Cockpit Ghost MFD Zoom Shift-1 SimToggleGhostMFDs
Cockpit HUD Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num divide OTW1200HUDView
Cockpit Wide/Normal Shift-2 SimToggleCockpit
Cockpit lower left Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num 0 OTW1200LView
Cockpit lower right Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num 2 OTW1200RView
Enemy aircraft Ctrl-8 OTWSelectAirEnemyMode
Enemy vehicle Alt-8 OTWSelectGroundEnemyMode
Extended FOV 5 OTWSelectEFOVPadlockMode
Flyby Shift-9 OTWSelectFlybyMode
Friendly 8 OTWSelectAirFriendlyMode
Friendly ground unit Shift-8 OTWSelectGroundFriendlyMode
Glance backward Num 3 OTWCheckSix
Glance forward Num 9 OTWGlanceForward
HUD Only 1 OTWSelectHUDMode
Incoming 7 OTWSelectIncomingMode
Look closer L FOVToggle
Mouse Look Hold Unassigned SimMouseLook
Mouse Look Off Unassigned SimMouseLookOff
Mouse Look On Unassigned SimMouseLookOn
Mouse Look Toggle Unassigned SimMouseLookToggle
Orbit 0 OTWSelectOrbitMode
Padlock 4 OTWSelectF3PadlockMode
Padlock EFOV Mode=AA Shift-5 OTWSelectEFOVPadlockModeAA
Padlock EFOV Mode=AG Alt-5 OTWSelectEFOVPadlockModeAG
Padlock Mode=AA Shift-4 OTWSelectF3PadlockModeAA
Padlock Mode=AG Alt-4 OTWSelectF3PadlockModeAG
Padlock next Num plus OTWStepNextPadlock
Padlock next AA Shift-Num plus OTWStepNextPadlockAA
Padlock next AG Alt-Num plus OTWStepNextPadlockAG
Padlock prev AA Shift-Num minus OTWStepPrevPadlockAA
Padlock prev AG Alt-Num minus OTWStepPrevPadlockAG
Padlock previous Num minus OTWStepPrevPadlock
Reset Shift-Ctrl-Alt-Num 5 OTWViewReset
Rotate down Num 2 OTWViewDown
Rotate left Num 4 OTWViewLeft
Rotate right Num 6 OTWViewRight
Rotate up Num 8 OTWViewUp
Satellite Camera Alt-Grave OTWSelectSatelliteMode
Target Shift-6 OTWSelectTargetMode
Toggle SA bar Shift-3 OTWToggleSidebar
Tower Camera Alt-0 OTWSelectTowerCamMode
Tracking 6 OTWTrackExternal
Virtual cockpit 3 OTWSelect3DCockpitMode
Weapon Shift-7 OTWSelectWeaponMode
Weapon's target Alt-7 OTWTrackTargetToWeapon
Zoom in Num 1 OTWViewZoomIn
Zoom out Num 7 OTWViewZoomOut
Voice
Transmit Com1 Alt-1 SimTransmitCom1
Transmit Com2 Alt-2 SimTransmitCom2
Wpn
A to A cycle hardpoints Enter SimNextAAWeapon
A to G cycle hardpoints Backspace SimNextAGWeapon
Bomb interval dec Ctrl-; BombIntervalDecrement
Bomb interval inc Ctrl-' BombIntervalIncrement
Bomb ripple dec Shift-; BombRippleDecrement
Bomb ripple inc Shift-' BombRippleIncrement
CBU burst altitude dec Ctrl-, BombBurstDecrement
CBU burst altitude inc Ctrl-. BombBurstIncrement
Fire gun / SimTrigger
MAN Reticle Shift-Ctrl-M SimReticleSwitch
Missile Bore/Slave Ctrl-U SimToggleMissileBoreSlave
Missile Hardpoints cycle Shift-/ SimMissileStep
Missile TD/BP Alt-U SimToggleMissileTDBPUncage
Pickle Space SimPickle
Release bombs in pairs Alt-' BombPairRelease
Release bombs singly Alt-; BombSGLRelease
Sidewinder Spot/Scan Shift-U SimToggleMissileSpotScan
Sidewinder-Cage/Uncage U SimToggleMissileCage
